_comment: Canonical enum values for the CNS node model. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Consumed by scripts/validator.py (Python, as sets), lab/scripts/vault_reader.py (validates Obsidian frontmatter) and cortxt/packages/cns-schema (JS, generated via its generate.mjs). Array order is semantic (progression where applicable) and preserved on the JS side. Retired enums (statuses/stages/mvp_stages/risk_categories) were removed in the health-scorecard work — NODE lifecycle/maturity is delegated to board, and per-entity health is derived at read-time (see scripts/health.py), not declared. That retirement STANDS: `venture_stages` below is a DIFFERENT axis — a venture's position in the investment funnel, not a node's maturity — and it is declared (by a human, in the vault) precisely because it cannot be derived. Legacy layer/pipeline/family enums are likewise NOT here. `entity_types` is an orthogonal, optional axis — what a node MODELS in its vertical (municipality/course/...) — distinct from `types` (technical/routing) and `domains` (vertical). `archetypes` is another orthogonal, optional axis — a component's reusable functional ROLE (etl/decision-engine/input/result), independent of stack; reference implementations are built per (archetype × stack). Soft-validated.
_venture_axis: TWO axes, deliberately separate, because they are different KINDS of field. (1) `phase` = how far the BUILD has come. Its values are roadmaps/_recipe.yaml — the existing, already-wired recipe (the app renders it; roadmaps/<slug>.md carries current_phase). It is PARTIALLY DERIVABLE: live = has a prod deploy, users = has users, paying = has revenue — so reconcile can eventually measure it. NOT duplicated here; _recipe.yaml stays the single source. (2) `gate_decision` = whether we keep investing. Borrowed from Stage-Gate (Cooper): go/kill/hold/recycle. It is NEVER derivable — it is an act of will, and it is the field the recipe lacked, which is why nothing ever got killed. Collapsing the two would let the measurable field drag the unmeasurable one into oblivion. These REPLACE three competing home-grown ladders (G0-G5, untested/testing/passed/failed, kund-problem-fit) that coexisted in the vault. See vault Efforts/Portföljkatalogen.
